metadata.description: Independent tools for Claude Code power users — real workflows, not framework wrappers.

plugins.name: hello
plugins.description: Sanity check plugin — verifies the install pipeline works. Says hello back.

plugins.name: openapi-guardian
plugins.description: Auto-sync OpenAPI spec ↔ route handlers ↔ TypeScript types ↔ SDK clients. Change one place, four others update.

plugins.name: token-guardian
plugins.description: Heuristic budget guard — track Claude Code activity, get warned ~30 min before you hit your 5h window, optionally route to OpenRouter when exhausted.
